title: White 2-in-1 Glass Mirror (11.5 cm) 1 Piece - 3x Magnification, Perfect for Health & Beauty Needs, 1 Piece
features: DUAL FUNCTION DESIGN: Experience convenience with our 2-in-1 mirror that serves as both a handheld and standing mirror, tailored for your comfort and diverse beauty routines.
PREMIUM CONSTRUCTION: Constructed with durable metal and glass, this mirror is designed for long-lasting use and elegance. It's a statement piece that will add sophistication to any room.
COMPACT & PORTABLE: At 11.5 cm in diameter, this mirror is perfectly sized for both home use and travel, ensuring you look your best anywhere. Its lightweight design makes it easy to carry around.

IDEAL FOR HEALTH & BEAUTY: Whether for plucking, tweezing, flossing, or applying makeup, this mirror is your quintessential accessory for all your health and beauty needs, providing a clear and detailed reflection each time.
ENHANCE MAGNIFICATION: With a 3x magnification, our mirror offers optimal viewing for detailed tasks, ensuring flawless makeup application and precise grooming.
description: Product Description The mirror is ideal for all health and beauty requirements and features an 11.5cm reflective diameter. Safety Warning No warning applicable
